title: Hero Reveal Turnaround Pack
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for locked-identity hero launch assets that connect cinematic reveal art, character-select crops, and production turnaround sheets with GPT Image 2.

en.title: Hero Reveal Turnaround Pack
en.description: Build a playable-hero reveal pack spanning splash art, bust crop, and multi-view turnaround assets that stay consistent across promo and production use.

zh-CN.title: 角色首曝与三视图包
zh-CN.description: 围绕一个新角色，同时做首曝主视觉、半身裁切和前后侧三视图，保证宣发图和设定图是同一个角色体系。
